column1: Hey Santiago, thanks for your interest in traveling with Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from Go Blue here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
Cool I got you. which destination were you lookin to book
word yea Cancun is super dope. how many ppl in your group so far?
yea thats solid! which school we all from?
oh fire Ive only heard good things! y'all def know how to party lol
gonna put this info together for you rn, how soon were you lookin to get things booked?
Loved “oh fire Ive only heard good things! y'all def know…”
We want to see prices and all of that
I was looking at the website and I also had some doubts about your party plans and I was wondering if you could explain that further
I'll send you a full breakdown on how it all works, may answer some of your questions
is it cool if I send most of the info through email? its a little long for text
yea whats the best email to send to
yo Santiago! missed your response over night. just sent that email over lmk if you got it
Got it, I'll go over it with my friends and text you if I have any questions
For now is what are the sponsored club for the party plan?

the party pass is valid for the nighclubs off of the resort property. it comes with express entry, cover charge, and open bar at our events at D'Cave, Coco Bongo, Rakata, Mandala, Mandala Beach Club, Vaquita, and a few more
Perfect, can we add other clubs?
yup thats just a sample quote so you can see pricing. when youre ready to get things started is when I make your actual reservation for the group
Are these prices per night or for the total? Also is it per person or total again?
the payment plan will be what you see in the email body
Liked “yup thats just a sample quote so you can see prici…”
prices are total, per person, for the entire stay
One question is if you guys also sell the party plans separate from a reservation
We are discussing it right now and we will let you know
How much will the party plan be if we don't do like hotel reservations w you?
so for just the party pass?
5 nights $300, 4 nights $279, 3 nights $220. and the booze cruise is $79
hey Santiago whats up, how we feelin about those options so far?
I believe we are going to go with just the party pass most likely
With those can we ask to add other clubs or is it only the ones you mentioned?
Also, where does the booze cruise stops?
It's only the clubs mentioned above. There may be 1 or 2 more avail
You're looking to do the party pass only?
okay cool yea we can hook it up with that. just lmk when you want it set up for the group
Liked “okay cool yea we can hook it up with that. just lm…”
yoo Santiago whats up, did we wanna lock in those party passes?
Hey man, I actually was gonna text you today
Yeah we would like to get the 3 night passw
Please send me the link w all the info ab them and stuff
I got you, how many ppl is it still 5?
hey gonna set the link up now and send it over
what dates will you be in Cancun and which resort are you staying at?
March 11 - 16. We will be staying at the Occidental Costa Cancun
ok cool, waiting to hear back from operations to see if we can service your hotel
What do you mean by service our hotel? Would that be for like transportation or something?
Hey sorry still waiting to hear back. And by service i mean since we normally do not host your resort, i need to confirm we'd be able to get you the party pass vouchers to your resort
since we don't normally have staff there
Liked “Hey sorry still waiting to hear back. And by servi…”
yoo so i just heard back, we can get you the pass, but you'd have to meet our staff at the Krystal resort to get your vouchers
the Krystal is right next to all the clubs in cancun, like a 2 min walk

so soon as we get things set up for the group, youll each hop on the link and mke your own payments for the party pass. once complete, our operations team has you on the party pass list, your vouchers become available in your account, and you then take those vouchers with you to the krystal to exchange for your party tickets
can be the screenshot from your account too doesnt have to be like a print out
when you meet with our staff youll, be able to choose which event nights you want tickets for
Liked “can be the screenshot from your account too doesnt…”
yoo checkin in, did we want to secure that pass?
Just double checking, the pass includes the entry to the club, a fast entry lane, and open bar inside?
awesome. will get that started now. yup! all 3 of those
how many ppl did we have in your group?
That's it right? Do we get a vp space in the clubs?
no VIP you can get on arrival if youd like. you'll just see the host at the venue and be able to book it. this party pass just comes with the open bar inside
is the group ready to make the payment tonight?
You said the pass includes fast entry to the clubs right?
Nvm just saw it on the email
yea you get to go in the party pass line instead of the general admission line
Liked “yea you get to go in the party pass line instead o…”
sup Santiago were you able to secure the party pass
Oh hey man, I'm so sorry but I kinda forgot
We'll get it today or tomorrow
cool all good. do you still have the link and stuff still
Yeah, is the same email right?
Also, is it okay with the dates that are mentioned in the email?
yes same email and same link https://secure.gobluetours.com/site/public/package/BKWOSYUFLB
We are ready to buy however I wanted to ask if the due date for the payment being Jan 28 affects something?
Also apologies for all the wait
No worries. you can still hop on!
Liked “No worries. you can still hop on!”
Some of us had already joined and paid
Also I keep getting emails to put our flight information in the site for airport pick up. Do you guys offer that with just the party pass?
apologies thats a system bug, the party pass doesnt come with the flight transportation
Just have a couple of questions with the schedule of clubs you sent. What are the additional $10 that appear in some of the options? Also is there ni way to get tickets for coco bongo another day?
the additional amounts are upgrade fees for those special events. there are other event options as well that dont have an upgrade, our on site staff will walk you through those options after check in
Is an upgrade for what? Can we still go if we don't want the upgrade?

you can go on any night they don't have those fees as is, but for those night specifically you'd have to pay a small upcharge . Nights where there is an upcharge are usually nights they have a big name DJ/Artist at that club, and the upcharge is usually like $10
Yo quick question, can we add a couple more people to the party pass at this point?
Also is there any chance to use coco bongo another day? Not only Wednesday
hey bro! yea its too late to add one more person online but they can go with you to the Krystal to buy theirs on site when you get there to meet our staff
and Coco Bongo is available any night!
Oh I thought we could only go on Monday thru Wednesday
apologies yes you're right about that
Wait so we can go another day or we can't?
Monday through Wednesday for Coco Bongo
so it'll have to be your first night
There's no way of moving that right?

At the moment those are the only days available for Coco Bongo. when you get there on site tomorrow our staff on the ground will have better intel on whats available the days youre there, what you can do, what other options there are, etc. Cancun has a big nightlife party center so theres usually tons of options outside of whats on the main event list
you wont have any upcharge for coco bongo, those small upcharges are for the main event nights
Sounds good, thank for all the help
Hey Spiffy, until what time will your staff be at the Krystal hotel?
Hi Santiago, I will check in now
Hey are you able to get there in an hour?
Perfect. Alex from our on site staff will be there for then, ready for yoh
Just in case, here is his number ‪+52 998 734 7954‬ Alex
as long as you have your vouchers screenshotted you should be all good. but if you want to bring it just in case, feel free
Alex will meet you out front by the lobby
